personas.name: New Developer
personas.role: First-time Aion user following the getting-started guide

stories.text: I can run the hello-world example end-to-end within 10 minutes of cloning the repo.
I can find and run an advanced example that matches my use case (saga, approval, pipeline).
I can understand error messages from the CLI without reading source code.
I can start the server with a single command and load workflows without editing config files.
I can inspect workflow state and event history through the CLI with human-readable output.

personas.name: SDK Consumer
personas.role: Developer writing activities in Python, TypeScript, or Rust

stories.text: I can install the worker SDK from the language's package registry and follow the README to register activities.
I can install the client SDK and start/signal/query workflows from my application.
